name: Example Deck — Pediatric Basics
description: Sample deck showing the format. Replace with your own.

cards.q: What is the typical age range for diagnosing autism spectrum disorder?
cards.a: Symptoms typically present before age 3, though diagnosis can occur later. Reliable diagnosis is often possible by age 2.

cards.q: Name three core features of ADHD.
cards.a: Inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity — present in two or more settings before age 12.

cards.q: What screening tool is commonly used for autism in toddlers?
cards.a: M-CHAT-R/F (Modified Checklist for Autism in Toddlers, Revised with Follow-Up), used at 18 and 24 months.
